Professional Email Template - PlayerStall


Complete Quote Response Email

Use Case: Response to customer inquiry with quote attachment
Includes: All current information + professional best practices

Professional Email Template


Subject: Your Custom Sports Locker Quote - [Project Name/Team Name]
Hi Dana,
Thank you for contacting PlayerStall regarding custom sports lockers for [Team Name/Facility Name]. I've reviewed your request and prepared a detailed quote for your project, which I've attached below.
QUOTE SUMMARY
  • 50 Stadium Lockers

  • Detailed pricing breakdown (see attached estimate)

  • Total value included: $130 in free upgrades per locker ($45 Prefinish + $35 Edging + $50 Backing)
    • OUR FLAGSHIP MODEL - THE STADIUM LOCKER
    Our Stadium Locker is $599 per locker and includes $130 in free upgrades:
  • Free Prefinish ($45 Value) - Premium wood finish included at no extra cost

  • Free Edging ($35 Value) - Professional edge finishing included

  • Free Backing ($50 Value) - Full backing included on all team orders
    • ADDITIONAL OPTIONS (Priced at Our Cost - No Markup)
  • Cushions: +$80 per locker

  • Name Plates: +$10 per locker

  • Lacquered prefinished wood options available

  • Lock boxes available
    • COMPLETE MODEL LINEUP
    We offer several models to fit different needs and budgets:
  • Semi Pro - $349

    •   Includes: Free Prefinished wood ($45 Value), Free Edging ($35 Value), and Free Backing ($50 Value)
  • Varsity - $449

    •   Includes: Free Prefinished wood ($45 Value), Free Edging ($35 Value), and Free Backing ($50 Value)
  • Pro - $549

    •   Includes: Free Prefinished wood ($45 Value), Free Edging ($35 Value), and Free Backing ($50 Value)
  • Stadium - $599 (Our Flagship Model)

    •   Includes: Free Prefinish ($45 Value), Free Edging ($35 Value), and Free Backing ($50 Value)
  • Corner Units - $599

    •   Perfect for maximizing corner space in your locker room
    All Team orders include Free Backing ($50 Value) on every model.
    VIEW OUR WORK
  • Full Gallery: http://playerstall.com/gallery/

  • Model Comparison: http://playerstall.com/ (homepage, halfway down the page)
    • WHY PLAYERSTALL?
    With 30+ years of experience serving collegiate and professional teams across North America, we understand what makes a great locker room. Our lockers are:
    ✓ Canadian-owned and operated since 1996 - Premium materials and craftsmanship you can trust
    ✓ Built to Last a Lifetime - These lockers are built strong and will last a lifetime, backed by our lifetime guarantee
    ✓ Fully Modular - If a piece gets broken in the future, you can call us and we will send a replacement right away
    ✓ Custom-Sized - Perfect fit for your space with no wasted room or awkward gaps
    NEXT STEPS
    To ensure we create the perfect custom-sized solution for your locker room, please send a quick drawing of the room with accurate dimensions. This allows us to custom-size the lockers to fit your space perfectly with no wasted room or awkward gaps.
    This quote is valid for 60 days. I'm here to answer any questions, discuss customization options, or help you choose the best model for your needs and budget.
    You can reach me directly at 1 (888) 584-1444 or simply reply to this email anytime.
    I look forward to helping you create an exceptional locker room solution for your team.
    Best regards,
    Monika
    Custom Locker Specialist
    PlayerStall
    1 (888) 584-1444
    playerstallsports@gmail.com
    playerstall.com
    30+ Years Experience | Lifetime Guarantee | Canadian-owned and operated since 1996 | Free Design Consultation

Alternative: More Concise Version

If you prefer a shorter version while keeping all information:


Subject: Your Custom Sports Locker Quote - [Project Name/Team Name]
Hi Dana,
Thank you for contacting PlayerStall! I've reviewed your request and prepared a detailed quote for 50 Stadium Lockers, which I've attached below.
QUOTE HIGHLIGHTS
  • 50 Stadium Lockers @ $599 each

  • Includes: Free Prefinish ($45 Value), Free Edging ($35 Value), Free Backing ($50 Value)

  • Additional Options: Cushions (+$80), Name Plates (+$10) - priced at our cost
    • OUR COMPLETE MODEL LINEUP
  • Semi Pro: $349 (includes all free upgrades)

  • Varsity: $449 (includes all free upgrades)

  • Pro: $549 (includes all free upgrades)

  • Stadium: $599 (our flagship - includes all free upgrades)

  • Corner Units: $599
    • All Team orders include Free Backing ($50 Value) on every model.
    VIEW OUR WORK
  • Full Gallery: http://playerstall.com/gallery/

  • Model Comparison: http://playerstall.com/ (homepage, halfway down)
    • WHY PLAYERSTALL?
    30+ years of experience | Canadian-owned and operated since 1996 quality | Lifetime guarantee | Fully modular (easy replacement) | Custom-sized to fit perfectly
    NEXT STEPS
    To custom-size the lockers perfectly for your space, please send a quick drawing of the room with accurate dimensions.
    This quote is valid for 60 days. I'm here to answer questions or discuss options.
    Call me at 1 (888) 584-1444 or reply to this email.
    Best regards,
    Monika
    Custom Locker Specialist
    PlayerStall
    1 (888) 584-1444
    playerstallsports@gmail.com
    playerstall.com
    30+ Years Experience | Lifetime Guarantee | Canadian-owned and operated since 1996 | Free Design Consultation

    Key Features of This Template

    ✅ Includes ALL Your Current Information:


  • All pricing (Stadium $599, Semi Pro $349, Varsity $449, Pro $549, Corner Units $599)

  • All free items (prefinish, edging, backing values)

  • Additional options (cushions +$80, name plates +$10)

  • Gallery link

  • Website reference

  • Side-by-side comparison mention

  • Drawing request

  • Modular design explanation

  • Lifetime durability mention

  • Contact information

  • Estimate attachment reference

    • ✅ Adds Professional Best Practices:


  • Personalized project acknowledgment

  • Professional structure and formatting

  • Key differentiators emphasized (30+ years, Canadian-owned and operated since 1996, Free Consultation)

  • Clear sections with headers

  • Professional signature block

  • Timeline expectations (60-day validity)

  • Consultative language

  • Clear call-to-action

    • ✅ Maintains Your Friendly Tone:


  • Still personal and approachable

  • Keeps your helpful, responsive style

  • Adds professionalism without being cold

    • Customization Notes

    Replace these placeholders:

  • [Project Name/Team Name] - Use actual team/facility name

  • [Team Name/Facility Name] - Use in opening if you have it

  • 50 Stadium Lockers - Adjust quantity/model as needed

    • Optional additions:

  • If you know the sport: "for your [football/hockey/basketball] team"

  • If you know the timeline: "I see you need these by [date]"

  • If budget was mentioned: "Based on your budget range of [amount]"

    • When to Use Each Version

    Full Version (Recommended):

  • First-time customers

  • Larger orders (50+ lockers)

  • When you want to emphasize value and professionalism

  • When competing against other quotes

    • Concise Version:

  • Repeat customers

  • Smaller orders

  • When customer is already familiar with your products

  • Quick responses needed

    • Subject Line Options

  • "Your Custom Sports Locker Quote - [Team Name]" (Best - specific, professional)

  • "PlayerStall Quote: 50 Stadium Lockers - [Project Name]" (Clear, includes quantity)

  • "Custom Locker Solution for [Team Name] - PlayerStall" (Consultative tone)

  • "Your Stadium Locker Quote - PlayerStall" (Simple, clear)

    • Last Updated: January 2025
    Prepared for: PlayerStall / playerstall.com
    npm run dev
    npm run dev
